durationRules: payment initiation approval delay failed activation and retry do not consume duration
exact start and end timestamps are visible before funding and after activation
expiry removes MoolSocial placement but never deletes the YouTube asset
renewal requires a newly accepted and funded placement
no reach or sales result is guaranteed by duration alone
sub-day burst placements are post-launch and separately governed
blockedAtLaunch: unrestricted native reel or long-form hosting
payment for YouTube view like comment share or subscription
direct MoolSocial recording to YouTube upload before Google verification quota and compliance approval
private embedding-disabled removed age-restricted or policy-blocked publication
campaign activation before maximum payable amount is reserved
claiming YouTube metrics as MoolSocial metrics
prototypeAcceptance: paste valid and invalid YouTube links
connect allow deny cancel expire revoke and reconnect
select eligible content and reject unsupported content
attach exactly one decisive MoolSocial action
show YouTube attribution separately from MoolSocial outcomes
exercise all seven durations and exact expiry
replay mobile and laptop journeys without console errors
